# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Discarded because the source is mostly a vendor launch post rather than a serious evidence-bearing artifact.

## Why

The excerpt contains one concrete internal compatibility result about popular NPM packages, but the piece is chiefly framing and promotion for Moltworker on Cloudflare rather than a disciplined benchmark, field report, incident report, or research artifact centered on substantive empirical results.

## Limits
